text: Hello. Hi. Hey. Good morning. James here from Nova Healthcare, Tennessee. I'm calling to let you know about a cashback benefit that may help with out-of-pocket expenses of up to $10,000, especially during a hospital stay. So, to check whether you are eligible for this, may I know your age, please? I'm sorry. I couldn't quite catch that. Can you please show your age with me?
